product_updates.title: Bret Taylor’s Sierra buys YC-backed AI startup Fragment
product_updates.content: Sierra, the AI customer service agent startup founded by technologist Bret Taylor, announced today that it has acquired the YC-backed French startup Fragment.

product_updates.title: Meet Noscroll, an AI bot that does your doomscrolling for you
product_updates.content: Noscroll wants to cure doomscrolling with an AI bot that reads the internet for you.

product_updates.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, bringing company one step closer to an AI ‘super app’
product_updates.content: OpenAI says its latest model offers increased capabilities across a broad variety of categories.

product_updates.title: Era raises $11M to build a software platform for AI gadgets
product_updates.content: Era thinks that we will see many form factors of AI hardware, including glasses, rings, and pendants.

product_updates.title: Grab a ticket today: The first StrictlyVC of 2026 kicks off in just a week in San Francisco
product_updates.content: StrictlyVC San Francisco is in just a week. Now’s the time to grab yourself a ticket. Join VCs and founders at Sentro Filipino Cultural Center on April 30.

product_updates.title: Another customer of troubled startup Delve suffered a big security incident
product_updates.content: TechCrunch has confirmed that Delve was the compliance company that performed the security certifications for Context AI, the AI agent training startup that last week disclosed a security incident.

product_updates.title: AI galaxy hunters are adding to the global GPU crunch
product_updates.content: Astronomers are turning to GPUs to find needles in the galactic haystack.

product_updates.title: Beehiiv rolls out new creator tools, including webinars and customizable paywalls
product_updates.content: The announcement is a clear sign the company is trying to become an all-in-one hub for creators, reducing the hassle of juggling various tools and services to run their businesses.

product_updates.title: India’s app market is booming — but global platforms are capturing most of the gains
product_updates.content: Non-gaming apps, led by streaming and AI, are driving growth, even as India's spending per user lags global peers.

technical_breakthroughs.title: In a first, a ransomware family is confirmed to be quantum-safe
technical_breakthroughs.content: Technically speaking, there's no practical benefit to use PQC. So why is it being used?

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: introducing the Nature issue
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Introducing: the Nature issue When we talk about “nature,” we usually mean something untouched by humans. But little of that world exists today. From microplas…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Will fusion power get cheap? Don’t count on it.
technical_breakthroughs.content: Fusion power could provide a steady, zero-emissions source of electricity in the future—if companies can get plants built and running. But a new study suggests that even if that future arrives, it might not come cheap. Technologies tend to get less expensive over time. Lithium-ion batteries are n…
